name: Chilaquiles
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cooked beef, chicken or pork (diced or shredded)
recipeInstructions:
1. BREAK THE EGGS in a mixing bowl and beat them lightly.
2. CUT THE TORTILLAS into eighths and add to the eggs. LET SIT 15 MINUTES.
3. CUT THE AVOCADOS in half from tip to stem, and remove the pit. SLICE the flesh in each half from tip to stem in 1/2-inch slices without cutting through the skin.
4. SCOOP THE FLESH OUT OF THE SKIN in 1 piece. LAY THE CUT SIDE DOWN on each plate and fan out the slices.
5. CUT THE TOMATOES into slices and LAYER THEM NEXT TO THE AVOCADO SLICES.
6. DRIZZLE WITH LIME JUICE AND OIL, and SPRINKLE WITH SALT AND PEPPER.
7. HEAT THE BUTTER in a large SKILLET over MEDIUM HEAT. ADD THE ONIONS, CHILI POWDER, AND CUMIN. COOK, STIRRING OCCASIONALLY, FOR 5 MINUTES.
8. ADD THE MEAT; COOK JUST UNTIL WARMED.
9. ADD THE BEATEN EGGS AND TORTILLAS; COOK, STIRRING, UNTIL EGGS ARE COOKED TO DESIRED DONSINESS.
10. ARRANGE A MOON OF EGGS ON EACH PLATE NEXT TO THE AVOCADO AND TOMATO SLICES.
11. GARNISH WITH SOME CILANTRO. SERVE IMMEDIATELY.
